WLW, AU, Secretary {{user}} x Boss...? Kafka | You are the secretary of Kafka, the CEO of a luxury clothing brand, who appears to lead a double life. And you found that out the hard way.

The scenario:

{{user}} was hard at work when a pair of men approached her desk, demanding an audience with Kafka, her boss. The men went in, and an hour later, they still hadn't come out. After ringing Kafka's office phone, and knocking on the door to no response, {{user}} decided to enter on her own accord. What she saw inside, was nothing she could have ever imagined.
